verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Prefer official Roblox/Discord/Trello evidence when accessible; otherwise require at least two credible current sources or one current source explicitly citing the official Discord.

sources.name: Official Roblox game page
sources.notes: Web access showed the title [Ghoul Update] Sailor Piece and the description still points players to the community server for news, updates, and exclusive reward codes. It does not publish current code strings. Local curl after clearing proxy variables failed DNS for www.roblox.com in this sandbox.

sources.name: Official Discord invite
sources.notes: Local curl after clearing proxy variables failed DNS for discord.com in this sandbox. Public web search did not expose official code-channel messages, so Discord was not used as direct code evidence today.

sources.name: Official Trello board
sources.notes: Web access returned Trello's JavaScript/resources blocked page, and local curl to the Trello JSON export after clearing proxy variables failed DNS for trello.com. The prior May 19 API check showed the public codes card lagging behind current Ghoul Update codes, so Trello was not used as direct proof today.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 20, 2026. Lists 8 active codes: SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG and the older Ghoul predecessor set as inactive.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Crawled today and last updated May 20, 2026. Lists the same 8 active codes as Pro Game Guides and publishes level requirements: level 12,500 for SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG3, SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG2, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, and SMALLDELAYCODESORRY; level 7,500 for GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It lists SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG and the older Ghoul predecessor set as expired.

sources.name: Destructoid Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 22, 2026. Lists all 9 active codes currently kept in codes.json, including SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG. It marks the three restart-bug variants as new-servers rewards and lists the older Ghoul predecessor set as expired.

sources.name: Beebom Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 19, 2026. Lists the stored 9 Ghoul Update active codes and provides exact reward bundles used for the SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG variants, BIGCONTENTUPDATESOON, FREECODEFORYALL, SMALLDELAYCODESORRY, GHOULUPDATE, MASTERY, and RAIDS. It says Sailor Piece codes arrive in the official Discord code-list channel, but it also still lists the older 10-code set as active, creating a stale-listing conflict.

sources.name: Dexerto Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 19, 2026. Says it added eight new codes after the Ghoul Update and lists all 9 active codes currently kept in codes.json. It points users to the official Discord for new codes. It also lists the older 10-code set as active, and its MASTERY reward bundle conflicts with Beebom's bundle.

sources.name: Pocket Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 17, 2026. Still lists the older Ghoul predecessor set active and does not include the May 19 Ghoul Update code wave, so it was treated as stale conflict context rather than proof to restore expired codes.

decisions.reason: Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current. GamesRadar still supports the stored level 12,500 requirement.
Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current. GamesRadar still supports the stored level 12,500 requirement.

Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current, while Pro Game Guides and GamesRadar list it inactive/expired. It was kept active because active evidence still outnumbers expiry evidence, Destructoid refreshed its page on May 22 with the code active, and direct official evidence was unavailable. GamesRadar still supports the stored level 12,500 requirement.

Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current. Beebom and Dexerto match the stored reward bundle, and GamesRadar still supports the stored level 12,500 requirement.

Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current. Beebom and Dexerto match the stored reward bundle, and GamesRadar still supports the stored level 12,500 requirement.

Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current. Beebom and Dexerto match the stored reward bundle, and GamesRadar still supports the stored level 12,500 requirement.

Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current. Beebom and Dexerto match the stored reward bundle, and GamesRadar still supports the stored level 7,500 requirement.

Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current. Beebom supports the stored reward bundle; Dexerto's MASTERY bundle conflicts and the other checked current sources do not publish exact rewards. GamesRadar still supports the stored level 7,500 requirement.
Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current after the Ghoul Update wave. GamesRadar still supports the stored level 7,500 requirement.
Current searches and checked sources did not show a new active code with official evidence, two credible current sources, or one current source explicitly citing official Discord for that new code.

No additional active code had strong enough expiry evidence to move today. The main expiry conflict for SORRYFORRESTARTGUYSTPBUG remains two sources expired/inactive versus three sources active/current.

source_conflicts.conflict: Pro Game Guides and GamesRadar list it inactive/expired, while Destructoid, Beebom, and Dexerto list it active/current. Destructoid refreshed on May 22 and still keeps it active.
source_conflicts.next_step: Move to expired only if official Discord/Trello confirms expiry or another strong current source joins Pro Game Guides and GamesRadar.

source_conflicts.conflict: Beebom lists the stored mastery bundle with 25 Bloodline Stone and no Raid Key; Dexerto lists a bundle with 10 Bloodline Stones and 5 Raid Keys. Pro Game Guides, Destructoid, and GamesRadar do not publish exact rewards.
source_conflicts.next_step: Keep Beebom's exact bundle until official evidence or another exact current source confirms a different reward.

source_conflicts.conflict: 700KFAVSTY, FREECODEHERE1, HUGEUPDATEWWW, DELAYCODENR1, DELAYCODENR2, 1B100MVISITS, 1B200MVISITS, 1B300MVISITS, 1M100KLIKESTYYY, and TYSMFOR400KFOLLOWONEVENT remain split: Pro Game Guides, GamesRadar, and Destructoid list them inactive/expired, while Beebom, Dexerto, and stale Pocket Gamer still list some or all as active.
source_conflicts.next_step: Do not restore unless official evidence appears or active-source agreement becomes stronger than the stale-listing pattern.
